visual_description: A man in a dark suit and striped tie stands in the foreground, looking forward with a serious expression, while another man in a dark jacket stands slightly behind him to the left. The scene shifts to a man in a black shirt standing near a metal barred window at night, his face partially illuminated. The final shot shows a group of men in formal attire gathered in a dimly lit room with fluorescent lighting, a tiled wall, and a red diamond-shaped sign on a door, with one man in a suit and badge facing the camera.
